sections.paragraph:
ἀντιλέγω [ἀντί, λέγω; ‘speak/say in opposition’]

—1. ‘speak in an adversarial manner’, contradict, argue against, speak against Lk 20:27; Ac 13:45; 28:19, 22; Tit 1:9; 2:9. By ext.

—2. ‘take a position in opposition to’, oppose, refuse Lk 2:34; J 19:12 (making oneself a king is tantamount to treasonous speech); Ro 10:21.
